home.title: Print Shuttle — Free Visual Print Layout & Batch Printing Designer
home.subtitle: Design and print certificates, labels, name badges, and letterhead directly in your browser. Import Excel data for batch printing. 100% private, no uploads.
home.feature1Desc: Drag-and-drop Fabric.js canvas with full layer management, vector shapes, tables, and text editing — like a desktop app in your browser.
home.feature2Desc: Import .xlsx files, bind data fields to text, barcodes, or images, and generate hundreds of personalized pages in one click.
home.feature3Desc: Generate QR Code, Code 128, EAN-13, Data Matrix, PDF417, and 35 more barcode symbologies. Content can be dynamically bound to data fields.
home.feature4Desc: Export multi-page designs as vector-quality PDF via jsPDF, or use the browser's native print dialog with preview support.
home.feature5Desc: Start from pre-designed letterhead, certificate, and red-header templates — or begin with a blank A4 canvas.
home.feature6Desc: All processing happens in your browser. Your designs and data never leave your device. No server uploads, no tracking.
home.step1Desc: Start from a blank canvas or select a pre-designed template — letterhead, certificate, or name badge
home.step2Desc: Add text, images, shapes, barcodes, and tables. Adjust fonts, colors, and layout on the visual canvas
home.step3Desc: Import an Excel file and bind columns to text, barcode, or image fields for batch generation
home.step4Desc: Export as PDF or print directly. Each row in your data source generates a separate page
home.whyTitle: The Complete Browser-Based Print Design Studio
home.whyP1: Print Shuttle is a free, browser-based visual print layout tool built on Fabric.js that brings desktop-grade design capabilities to the web. Whether you need to create professional letterhead with custom headers and logos, print certificates for an event, generate name badges for a conference, or produce shipping labels with barcodes for a warehouse — Print Shuttle handles it all without installing any software. The canvas editor supports full layer management, vector drawing (rectangles, circles, polygons, lines), a built-in table editor with cell merge/split, and 40 barcode formats powered by bwip-js.
home.whyP2: What makes Print Shuttle uniquely powerful is its variable data printing feature. Import an Excel (.xlsx) file and bind columns to text, barcode, or image elements on your canvas. One click generates hundreds of personalized pages — each with different names, photos, serial numbers, or barcode content. This makes it ideal for batch printing employee badges, product labels, award certificates, and more. All processing happens entirely in your browser using SheetJS for Excel parsing and jsPDF for PDF export. Your sensitive business data never leaves your device.
home.privacyBadge: Your data never leaves your device

about.heroSubtitle: A free, privacy-first visual print layout and batch printing designer by ShuttleLab
about.serviceP1: Print Shuttle is a free browser-based visual print design tool that runs entirely in your browser. Unlike cloud-based design tools that upload your files to remote servers, Print Shuttle processes everything locally using Fabric.js for canvas rendering, SheetJS for Excel parsing, bwip-js for barcode generation, and jsPDF for PDF export. Supporting certificates, labels, name badges, letterhead, and any custom print layout, it is the most comprehensive browser-based print design tool available.
about.serviceP2: Built by ShuttleLab with the PaperStudio open-source engine (MIT), Print Shuttle serves office administrators, event organizers, warehouse managers, educators, and anyone who needs to design and print professional documents. Whether you are batch-printing employee ID badges with photos, generating shipping labels with GS1-128 barcodes, creating award certificates for a school ceremony, or designing custom stationery for your business, Print Shuttle handles it all with zero privacy risk and instant results.
about.safeDesc: All design and data processing happens locally in your browser. No files are uploaded, no data is collected, and third parties cannot access your designs or business data.
about.privacyDesc: Start designing immediately — no sign-up, no email, no tracking. Just open the editor and start creating.
about.ttlDesc: Import .xlsx files, bind data fields to canvas elements, and generate hundreds of personalized pages in one click.
about.fastDesc: Real-time canvas editing with Fabric.js. PDF export and barcode generation happen instantly in your browser with no server round-trip.
about.use1: Office administrators printing letterhead, memos, and internal documents
about.use2: Event organizers creating certificates, name badges, and table cards
about.use3: Warehouse teams generating product labels with barcodes and QR codes
about.use4: Educators making practice worksheets, grid paper, and music sheets
about.contactDesc: Have questions, feedback, or need support?
about.supportDesc: Print Shuttle is crafted with care by ShuttleLab — completely free with no limits. If it has helped you design or print even a single page, sharing it with friends who need it is the best support we could ask for.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: At Print Shuttle, your privacy is our core value. This Privacy Policy explains our approach to data collection and processing when you use print.shuttlelab.org.
privacyPage.section1Content: Print Shuttle does not collect, store, or transmit any of your design files, data inputs, or personal information. All operations — canvas editing, Excel parsing, barcode generation, and PDF export — occur entirely within your web browser using JavaScript libraries (Fabric.js, SheetJS, bwip-js, jsPDF). Your data never leaves your device.
privacyPage.section2Content: Print Shuttle uses your browser's localStorage to store your preferences, such as theme selection (light/dark/system) and language settings (English/Chinese). This data remains on your device and is never transmitted to our servers.
privacyPage.section3Content: Unlike cloud-based design tools, Print Shuttle performs all operations locally in your browser. There is no server-side processing, no file uploads, and no temporary storage on remote servers. This design ensures complete privacy for your designs and business data.
privacyPage.section4Content: Print Shuttle uses the following third-party services as data subprocessors: (1) Cloudflare — hosting and content delivery. Cloudflare may collect standard web server logs (IP address, browser type, access time) as part of normal CDN operation. We do not use analytics trackers, advertising networks, payment processors, or any other third-party services that collect user data. Your design files and data are never transmitted to any third party.
privacyPage.section5Content: Print Shuttle does not use cookies. All user preferences are stored in localStorage, which is not transmitted to our servers.
privacyPage.section6Content: Print Shuttle does not knowingly collect any personal information from children under 13. Since we do not collect any personal data at all, our service is safe for users of all ages.
privacyPage.section7Content: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Any changes will be reflected in the 'Last updated' date above. Your continued use of Print Shuttle after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacyPage.section8Content: Since Print Shuttle does not collect or store any personal data, there is no personal data to access, modify, or delete. All your design files and data remain exclusively on your device. If you have questions about your rights under GDPR (EU) or CCPA (California), please contact us at support@shuttlelab.org.
privacyPage.section9Content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at support@shuttlelab.org.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.intro: Welcome to Print Shuttle. These Terms of Service govern your use of print.shuttlelab.org. By accessing or using Print Shuttle, you agree to be bound by these terms.
termsPage.section1Content: Print Shuttle is a free, browser-based visual print layout and batch printing designer. All processing occurs locally in your browser — no data is uploaded to our servers. The service is provided as-is by ShuttleLab at no cost to the user.
termsPage.section2Content: By using Print Shuttle, you represent that you are at least 13 years old and have the authority to enter into this agreement. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use our service.
termsPage.section3Content: We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access and use Print Shuttle for personal and professional purposes. You may use the tool to design and print documents you own or have permission to create.
termsPage.section4Content: You are responsible for the content you create and print through Print Shuttle. You agree to only process data you own or have legal permission to handle. You must not use the service for any illegal purpose.
termsPage.section5Content: Print Shuttle and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by ShuttleLab. The editor engine is based on PaperStudio (MIT License) by jingguanzhang. The tool uses standard web libraries (Fabric.js, jsPDF, SheetJS, bwip-js) that are open source.
termsPage.section6Content: Print Shuttle is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or produce specific results.
termsPage.section7Content: ShuttleLab shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of Print Shuttle, including but not limited to loss of data, loss of profits, or business interruption.
termsPage.section8Content: Print Shuttle may contain links to other ShuttleLab products or third-party websites. We are not responsible for the content or practices of these external sites.
termsPage.section9Content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting. Your continued use of Print Shuttle after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
termsPage.section10Content: For questions about these Terms, contact us at support@shuttlelab.org.
termsPage.refundContent: Print Shuttle is completely free — there are no paid plans, subscriptions, or in-app purchases. No payment is collected, so no refunds are applicable. If this policy changes in the future, we will update this section and provide a clear refund window.
